title: Faculty
modalDesc: Workspace for instructors where they prepare lessons, hold meetings, and assist students academically..

title: Science Laboratories
cardDesc: State-of-the-art laboratories for Chemistry, Biology, Physics, and Environmental Science with modern equipment.
modalDesc: Our Science & Technology Center features cutting-edge laboratories equipped with modern instruments for hands-on learning. It includes dedicated spaces for Chemistry, Biology, Physics, and Environmental Science research and practical training.

title: College Registrar's Office
cardDesc: Dedicated facility for Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering programs with workshop spaces and testing labs.
modalDesc: A comprehensive engineering facility featuring workshop spaces, CAD laboratories, and testing equipment for Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering students. Designed to bridge theory and practical industrial applications.

title: College Department FSM Laboratory
cardDesc: Computer labs, networking facilities, and software development centers for IT education and research.
modalDesc: State-of-the-art IT facility with advanced computer labs, networking simulation centers, and software development studios. Equipped with latest hardware and software for world-class IT education.

title: Gymnasium
cardDesc: Modern facilities for business courses including case study rooms, simulation labs, and meeting spaces.
modalDesc: Purpose-built facility for business education featuring case study rooms, business simulation laboratories, and professional meeting spaces. Designed to simulate real-world business environments.

title: Library & Learning Commons
cardDesc: A quiet and resource-rich study area....
modalDesc: Provides books, digital resources, and quiet study areas for research and learning.

title: Computer Labs & Innovation Center
cardDesc: Equipped with computers and software for practical lessons, especially for tech-related courses.
modalDesc: Equipped with computers and software for practical lessons, especially for tech-related courses.

title: Automotive Workshop
cardDesc: Well-equipped facility for automotive engineering students with modern tools and simulation software.
modalDesc: State-of-the-art automotive workshop designed for hands-on learning in vehicle maintenance, repair, and engineering. Features modern diagnostic equipment and simulation software.

title: Motorcycle Workshop
cardDesc: Well-equipped facility for motorcycle engineering students with modern tools and simulation software.
modalDesc: State-of-the-art motorcycle workshop designed for hands-on learning in vehicle maintenance, repair, and engineering. Features modern diagnostic equipment and simulation software.

title: Office of Student Affairs
cardDesc: Support services for students including academic advising, career counseling, and student life programs.
modalDesc: Comprehensive student support center offering academic advising, career services, and programs to enhance the overall student experience.
